shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "useCombobox getItemProps onMouseDown preventDownshiftDefault input focus blur flicker" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"getItemProps|onMouseDown|preventDownshiftDefault|callAllEventHandlers\" src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/utils.js src/__tests__/utils.call-all-event-handlers.js package.json && sed -n '400,620p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/utils.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function callAllEventHandlers|const callAllEventHandlers|export.*callAll\" src/utils.js && sed -n '100,155p' src/utils.js && sed -n '180,420p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '82,108p' src/utils.js && sed -n '1,175p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js && rg -n \"focus|mouseDown|clickOnItem\" src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__ src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js"

/bin/bash -lc 'git log --all --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | head -20 && git grep -n "itemHandleMouseDown" $(git rev-list --all | head -30) -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js 2>/dev/null | head -20'
/bin/bash -lc "git show 19f6bc0:src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | sed -n '235,335p'; git show 19f6bc0 --stat --oneline; git log --all --oneline --grep='mousedown\\|focus' | head -30"
/bin/bash -lc "git show 118a872 -- src/downshift.js src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | sed -n '1,240p'; git branch -a --contains HEAD | head"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && npx kcd-scripts test --no-watch src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git diff --check && git diff --stat && sed -n '255,340p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js"
